data.title: How Isolating Megamenu Help?
data.summary: Removing a module that runs on every page simplfies the core system

sections.title: Where friction appears
items: Advanced navigation requirements (eg: A/B tests) bring risk due to module customisation inside the core
Styling updates increase css bundling size with poor refactoring capabilities

data.closing: Navigation is not impacting on the core transactional code surface.
